name_en: New Bucket Bag, Imported Bursting Sheepskin, Color: Classic Black, Size: 30*23*17
name_cn:
New Bucket Bag, Imported Bursting Sheepskin, Color: Classic Black, Size: 30*23*17
Balenciaga Paris's latest LeCagole bucket bag comes with a heart-shaped mirror and a card holder, which is so cool 🆒
